name: Update README to match actual code
description: README.md is severely outdated and doesn't match the actual code in dataprocessor.py. Key issues: (1) version says 1.0 but code is 3.2, (2) documents process_csv() which no longer exists — replaced by process_file(), (3) says summary() returns a string but it returns a dict, (4) Python 3.6+ but code uses dataclasses (3.7+) and typing features, (5) config format is JSON not INI, (6) missing new features: JSON file support, to_json(), to_csv(), ProcessorConfig, file_format parameter. Update the README to accurately document the v3.2 API.
